title: 10 best herbal teas for fungal infection
description: English lavender teas helps with fungal infection because of its potent antifungal properties. The tea's main component, linalool, has been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi, including Candida albicans, a common cause of yeast infections. Additionally, the tea's calming and anti-inflammatory effects may help reduce discomfort and itching associated with fungal infections.
